description: Baseline: 3 test failures (2 flaky engine tests with 2s timeout too tight). total_tests needs fix in script.
fix: increase engine test timeouts from 2s to 10s — fixes 3 flaky tests in claude/codex/pi
feat: add hal status --json command with v1 workflow state machine contract (internal/status package + cmd/status.go + 14 new tests)
feat: add hal doctor --json command with v1 health contract — engine-aware (skips codex checks for pi/claude), 13 new tests
fix: isolate Codex linker from real ~/.codex in tests — CodexLinker respects $HOME env, init tests use t.Setenv, 2 new isolation tests
fix: remove 'legacy' label from hal report — now 'Generate summary report for completed work', update root help to include status/doctor
feat: add --json flag to hal run — outputs structured RunResult contract with ok/iterations/complete/summary
feat: add --json shorthand to hal analyze alongside --format json, with conflict guard
feat: expand hal cleanup to remove orphaned rules/ directory, add 2 new tests
feat: add --json flag to hal report — outputs structured ReportResult contract with reportPath/summary/recommendations
feat: add --json flag to hal auto — outputs structured AutoResult contract
feat: add --json flag to hal validate — outputs ValidationResult as JSON
feat: add --json flag to hal init — outputs structured InitResult with created/skipped files
feat: add --json flag to hal convert — outputs structured ConvertResult with outputPath/valid
feat: add --json flag to hal cleanup — outputs structured CleanupResult with removed items list
docs: improve hal init help — explicitly separates repo-local, engine-local, and global (~/.codex) side effects
test: add status, doctor, cleanup, convert to core metadata contract tests — locks Example/Long/Short/Use
feat: add --json flag to hal config — outputs config existence, path, and content as JSON
feat: doctor detects legacy debris (.goralph, ralph links, rules/) — warns with remediation hint, 2 new tests
feat: add --json flag to hal standards list — outputs count and index as JSON
feat: add --json flag to hal review — outputs ReviewLoopResult directly, skips glamour rendering
feat: enrich status with manual detail (story counts, nextStory, branchName), compound detail (step, branch), paths — 5 new tests
feat: enrich human-readable status with story counts, branch, next story, compound step — 1 new test
feat: add --json flag to hal archive list — outputs ArchiveInfo array with JSON tags, date/feature/stats
feat: status detects review-loop as first-class workflow track — review_loop state when reports exist w/o PRD, supplementary detail when co-existing with manual
feat: doctor provides actionable remediation commands — each check has Remediation{command, safe}, DoctorResult has primaryRemediation, human output shows Fix: line, 3 new tests
feat: add --json flag to hal version — outputs VersionInfo with version/commit/buildDate/go/os/arch
feat: human-readable status shows review-loop report path when available
feat: add hal continue command — combines status + doctor into one 'what to do next' answer, doctor issues shown first as blockers, 4 new tests
docs: add continue/version to root help and core metadata tests
feat: hal cleanup now removes deprecated .claude/skills/ralph and .pi/skills/ralph engine links — 1 new test
feat: doctor detects broken skill symlinks in .claude/skills/ and .pi/skills/ — catches test-leaked and stale links, 2 new tests
test: add machine contract field-locking tests — status/doctor/continue JSON fields and contract versions locked against regressions
fix: doctor summary now gives specific warning-aware guidance (e.g. 'run hal cleanup' or 'refresh Codex links') instead of generic 'usable with warnings'
feat: add --json flag to hal explode (flag registration only, output wiring deferred)
fix: doctor human output shows engine name so users know which engine was checked
feat: doctor JSON includes engine field — agents can see which engine was checked
fix: remove t.Parallel() from tests that walk shared global Root() command tree — fixes race condition causing intermittent metadata test failures
verification run — confirms race fix stability, no code changes
feat: doctor validates config.yaml YAML syntax — catches invalid YAML with specific error message and refresh-templates remediation, 1 new test
feat: status detects compound_complete state when auto-state step is 'done' — recommends hal report, 1 new test
docs: update status help to document compound_complete and review_loop_complete states
feat: doctor checks prompt.md existence and content — warns on missing/empty with remediation, 3 new tests
feat: continue human output shows compound step/branch when in compound workflow
feat: add --json to hal archive create — outputs ArchiveCreateResult with archiveDir/name/ok/error
docs: add status/doctor/continue to README commands table, fix report description from 'legacy' to 'generate summary report'
feat: add --json to hal archive restore — outputs ok/name/error as JSON
feat: doctor checks progress.txt existence — warns if missing so run history tracking is preserved
feat: doctor checks engine-local skill links (.claude/skills, .pi/skills) for stale targets — complements broken link and codex global checks
feat: doctor JSON includes totalChecks/passedChecks fields for quick health summary
feat: doctor human output shows check pass rate (e.g. 'Checks: 11/12 passed')
feat: status summary includes story counts (e.g. 'Manual workflow in progress (3/5 stories complete)') for agent-friendly parsing
test: add doctor determinism test — verifies check order, status, and counts are stable across runs
test: add status determinism test — verifies state, track, summary, and story counts are stable across runs
feat: status suggests 'hal convert' when markdown PRD exists but no JSON PRD — smarter next-action routing, 2 new tests
feat: status suggests 'hal auto' when manual is complete AND reports exist — smarter pipeline progression, 1 new test
test: add contract test for status manual detail fields — locks totalStories, completedStories, nextStory, paths in JSON
feat: add hal links command group — links status --json inspects per-engine link health, links refresh [engine] recreates links without touching .hal/, 4 new tests
docs: add links command to root help and README commands table
feat: add hal repair command — auto-applies safe doctor remediations (init, cleanup), dry-run + json support, re-checks after repair, 5 new tests
docs: add repair to root help, README, and core metadata tests
feat: doctor checks include scope (repo/engine_local/engine_global/migration) and applicability (required/optional/not_applicable) fields
test: verify scope/applicability populated on all doctor checks — codex is not_applicable for pi, legacy is migration scope
feat: doctor validates prd.json structure when present — checks JSON syntax and stories/userStories key existence
test: add prd.json doctor check tests — invalid JSON, valid JSON, and missing (skip) cases
feat: wire hal explode --json output — outputs ExplodeResult with outputPath/taskCount/summary
test: add doctor check count and order contract test — locks all 13 check IDs in expected order
test: add links status broken symlink detection test — verifies broken links shown in per-link detail
test: add links command family to metadata contract tests, make parent linksCmd runnable for scope inclusion
